name: hb_3_11
requirements: As part of your analysis, rank the stations of 石家庄市 (Shijiazhuang) by daily mean AQI on 2025-06-20. Compute and store: top5_station_ids (list of the 5 highest, int), most_polluted_station_id (int), most_polluted_mean_aqi (float).

turns.query: Analyze the hourly pollution trends of the 5 most polluted stations in 石家庄市 on 2025-06-20 and identify cross-station pollution transport patterns.
